Type of immunization the baby received

priority_indicators.label: ANC Clients Not Admissioned to Labour
Gestational age assessed using ultrasound/POCUS
priority_indicators.note: Uses GA by ultrasound recording as the primary signal; POCUS-completed concept included where present.

priority_indicators.label: At least 4 ANC contacts
priority_indicators.note: Counts distinct ANC visit dates per person; persons with ≥4 distinct dates are flagged.

priority_indicators.label: Screened for infection
priority_indicators.note: Composite: HIV tested OR syphilis tested OR MRDT tested — reflects any infection-screening pathway.

priority_indicators.label: Labour Clients Not Admissioned to PNC
Partograph use
priority_indicators.note: Partograph documentation is the proxy for intrapartum monitoring (paper or digital).

priority_indicators.label: Deliveries with objective blood loss measurement
priority_indicators.note: Any documented blood loss value (Estimated blood loss concept) counts as objective measurement.

priority_indicators.label: Women with imminent preterm birth receiving ACs
Eligible women receiving antibiotic prophylaxis
priority_indicators.note: Covers azithromycin prophylaxis and surgical antibiotic prophylaxis (ampicillin, cefazolin, benzylpenicillin).

priority_indicators.label: Overall caesarean section rate
priority_indicators.note: Monitoring rate — lower limit 15% reflects CEmONC access threshold. Emergency versus elective caesarean section split is still awaiting data.

priority_indicators.label: Uterotonic given after birth
priority_indicators.note: Oxytocin or misoprostol documented in the labour episode. Timing relative to birth is not captured.

priority_indicators.label: Immediate skin-to-skin care for newborn
priority_indicators.note: Proxy: thermal care recorded at neonatal enrolment (which follows delivery) OR thermal status = Not hypothermic on admission.

priority_indicators.label: Newborns not breathing at birth receiving bag-mask ventilation
priority_indicators.note: Eligible for neonatal resuscitation flag as denominator; resuscitation given as numerator. Within-1-minute timing not captured.

priority_indicators.label: Maternal sepsis rate
priority_indicators.note: Burden rate — lower is better.

priority_indicators.label: PPH with WHO treatment bundle
priority_indicators.note: Bundle proxy: PPH identified AND ≥2 of oxytocin / TXA / misoprostol documented.

priority_indicators.label: Pre-eclampsia/eclampsia receiving magnesium sulphate
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from magnesium sulphate administration documented in the labour episode.

priority_indicators.label: Birth weight recorded
priority_indicators.note: Uses birth weight documentation linked to the delivery episode or immediate newborn record for the same client.

priority_indicators.label: Early initiation of breastfeeding within 1 hour of birth
priority_indicators.note: Tracks breastfeeding initiation documented in the labour or PNC episode. Exact within-1-hour timing is not yet explicitly captured in the extract.

priority_indicators.label: Birth weight assessed
priority_indicators.note: Proxy via Prematurity/Kangaroo concept at PNC visit (records Low birth weight / Normal weight category).

priority_indicators.label: Blood pressure measured during PNC
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from systolic and diastolic blood pressure concepts documented in PNC records.

priority_indicators.label: Temperature of mother measured during PNC
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from maternal temperature concepts documented in PNC records.

priority_indicators.label: Vitamin K at birth
priority_indicators.note: Vitamin K given documented at labour/delivery or neonatal enrolment, carried forward to PNC via person-level flag.

priority_indicators.label: Low birthweight newborns
priority_indicators.note: Burden rate — lower is better.

priority_indicators.label: Birth asphyxia among newborn admissions
priority_indicators.note: Burden rate — proxied from birth asphyxia suspected and resuscitation-eligibility concepts.

priority_indicators.label: Neonatal sepsis among newborn admissions
priority_indicators.note: Burden rate — proxied from sepsis-related observation concepts.

priority_indicators.label: Pulse oximeter used at admission
priority_indicators.note: Tracked using pulse oximeter or oxygen saturation documentation captured at neonatal admission.

priority_indicators.label: Babies who had bilirubin measured
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from bilirubin-related measurement concepts documented in newborn care.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with jaundice who had bilirubin measured
priority_indicators.note: Uses clinical jaundice plus bilirubin-measurement documentation in the newborn record.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with jaundice receiving phototherapy
priority_indicators.note: Uses clinical jaundice and phototherapy treatment documentation as the newborn jaundice care pathway proxy.

priority_indicators.label: Babies breastfed within 1 hour
priority_indicators.note: Uses breastfeeding initiation documented around birth and carried as a person-level flag into the newborn pathway.

priority_indicators.label: Eligible babies who received neonatal resuscitation
Eligible preterm and low birth-weight babies who receive iKMC
Babies between 1000-1499g who receive prophylactic CPAP
Babies between 1500-1999g who receive prophylactic CPAP
priority_indicators.note: Tracked from birth-weight bands plus newborn CPAP treatment observations already normalized into the parquet. This remains a weight-band proxy because respiratory distress syndrome is not modeled separately.

priority_indicators.label: Babies with clinical jaundice who receive phototherapy
priority_indicators.note: Jaundice identification used as phototherapy proxy (MAHIS clinical jaundice → phototherapy care pathway).

priority_indicators.label: Babies with suspected sepsis who receive parenteral antibiotics
Babies not hypothermic at any time in the neonatal unit
priority_indicators.note: Proxy from admission thermal status — longitudinal stay temperature not yet in extract.

priority_indicators.label: Bilirubin measured in babies with jaundice
Blood culture done for babies on antibiotics
Total Births
priority_indicators.note: DHIS2-only indicator (Analytics sum of live births + stillbirths). No MAHIS numerator/denominator filters are defined, so this shows no data in MAHIS mode.

priority_indicators.label: Fresh Stillbirths
priority_indicators.note: DHIS2-only indicator. No MAHIS numerator/denominator filters are defined, so this shows no data in MAHIS mode.

priority_indicators.note: DHIS2-only indicator. No MAHIS numerator/denominator filters are defined, so this shows no data in MAHIS mode.

priority_indicators.note: DHIS2-only indicator. No MAHIS numerator/denominator filters are defined, so this shows no data in MAHIS mode.
